main.description: A FACTUAL OBSERVATION of capital movement between public capital buckets (asset-class / sector / region / theme), traced from public market data (exchange data / fund-flow reports / central-bank releases / index providers). OBSERVATION only (G2, トレードはしない): buy / sell / long / short / recommend / target-price are NOT enum members and the flow is never a trade instruction. Sourced (G3): ≥2 public-source citations. NON-advisory: records where capital MOVED, never what to do.

sources.description: G3 INVARIANT — ≥2 public-source URLs/CIDs (exchange / fund-flow report / central bank / index provider).

noTradeNotice.description: G2 INVARIANT — only true. An observation, never a trade instruction.

source.description: → :bucket/id money left (or 'external' for a pure inflow)

kind.description: G2 INVARIANT — FACTUAL observation kinds only. buy / sell / long / short / recommend / overweight / target-price are NOT enum members (トレードはしない).

target.description: → :bucket/id money went to (or 'external' for a pure outflow)
